sections.paragraph:
(“whom God has set”), Eliakim, pr.n.-

(1) the prefect of the palace in the reign of Hezekiah. 2Ki 18:18 19:2 Isa 22:20 36:3 .-(2) a son of king Josiah, made king by Necho, king of Egypt, who changed his name to יֹויָקִים (“whom Jehovah has set”). 2Ki 23:34 24:1 Jer 1:3 1Ch 3:15.-(3) Neh 12:41.
